title: Austrostipa platychaeta
taxonomy: Austrostipa platychaeta is classified in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses, which is one of the largest and most widespread plant families. This classification places Austrostipa platychaeta within the monocot group of flowering plants. The genus Austrostipa is a group of tussock grasses native to Australia, and Austrostipa platychaeta is one of its species. Within the Poaceae family, Austrostipa platychaeta is further classified in the subfamily Danthonioideae. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Austrostipa platychaeta with other plants in the Poaceae family.
